label: 1506 CE
era_summary: Year 1506 (MDVI) was a common year starting on Thursday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1506 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1506: Morocco-Portugal, 1505-14; Portugal-Zanj (Tanzania, Kenya, Somalia), 1505-06. Maddison records GDP/capita 1232 (ESP, 1506) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
